data.body: Close-out landed (commit ae70cb61). Plan-review PASS (0 blocking, 10 advisory — the advisories CONFIRMED the AC5 tension; resolved below). AC1: all 47 bare # noqa: BLE001 re-validated with accurate reasons (general-purpose subagent audit: zero suspects); 0 bare noqas remain repo-wide. AC2: reconciler inline noqa:T201 left in place as per-site documentation (none migrated; covered by the scoped per-file-ignore). AC3/epic-AC4 (NON-vacuous): TWO opportunistic narrowings surfaced/prevented hidden bugs, each with a regression test — (1) _json_or -> json.JSONDecodeError unmasked a silently-swallowed TypeError on non-str input (test_json_or_narrowing.py); (2) grounding worker boundary except BaseException (inert BLE0001 typo) -> except Exception so KeyboardInterrupt/SystemExit propagate (test_worker_entry_propagates_interrupts). AC4: convention documented durably in CLAUDE.md (named-logger substrate, stdout-sacred, MCP raise-don't-catch, observability floor + noqa-with-reason, T201 scope) pointing at src/rebar/_logging.py. AC5: BLE001 allowlist EMPTY (no src package exempt; ruff BLE001 green tree-wide => a new blind-except fails CI everywhere). T201 keeps scoped per-file-ignores ONLY for the documented permanent legitimate-print surfaces (_commands, _engine_support, reconciler+jira-probe, _alias); plan-review G6 confirmed the literal 'empty T201' is non-executable without breaking those — documented in pyproject. AC6: make lint + full suite (3215 passed/13 skipped, run ALONE/serialized, HEAD stable) green. Blind-except cluster: verified EXHAUSTIVELY via the lint gate (stronger than a sampled joe-janitor audit — the gate makes the cluster impossible). Close-out code-review (general-purpose): clean (comment-only noqa edits, reasons accurate, docs consistent).
